note: Select archetypes by ID. Do not invent generic sections. If no archetype fits, pick the closest and document the delta.

hero.label: Full Bleed Scroll-Reveal Hero
hero.layout: Video fills 100vw × 100vh. Text appears on scroll, not on load. CTA fades in at 30% scroll.

hero.label: Split Hero — Video / Typography
hero.layout: 50/50 or 60/40 vertical split. Video one side, bold typography other side. CTA in text column.

hero.label: Texture Background + Heavy Typography
hero.layout: Video runs at low opacity as texture. Enormous display type dominates. Almost no layout — just type.

hero.label: Asymmetric Grid Hero
hero.layout: CSS grid hero with unequal columns. Video in one grid cell (not full-bleed). Elements break the grid intentionally.

hero.label: Minimal Dark Hero — Single Element Focus
hero.layout: Dark background, video as ambient light source. One headline, one CTA, nothing else above fold.

hero.label: Anchored Bottom Text Hero
hero.layout: Full-bleed video top, text block anchored to bottom edge of viewport. Text appears to ground the video.

navigation.label: Ghost Minimal Nav
navigation.layout: Transparent background, no border, minimal items (≤4). Becomes subtle on scroll.

navigation.label: Side Vertical Nav
navigation.layout: Fixed to left or right side of screen. Items listed vertically. Unusual — high distinctiveness.

navigation.label: Bottom Fixed Nav
navigation.layout: Navigation anchored to bottom of screen. App-like. Items icon+label.

navigation.label: Bold Persistent Nav with CTA
navigation.layout: Full-width nav bar with brand name left, items center, CTA button right. Stays visible.

navigation.label: Hidden Nav — Scroll Up to Reveal
navigation.layout: Nav hidden on load. Appears when user scrolls up (intent signal).

content.label: Staggered Card Grid
content.layout: Cards in an offset/staggered grid, not aligned to a rigid column. Cards reveal on scroll with stagger delay.

content.label: Horizontal Scroll Section
content.layout: Section scrolls horizontally while page scrolls vertically. Items pass left-to-right on scroll.

content.label: Sticky Scroll Reveal
content.layout: Left column sticks while right content scrolls through multiple points. Transforms text/image pairs.

content.label: Editorial Full-Width Prose
content.layout: Full-width text with generous margins. Mix of display and body type. Occasional full-bleed image break.

content.label: Styled Comparison/Data Table
content.layout: Clean tabular data with custom styling. Rows animate in on scroll.

content.label: Full-Screen Manifesto
content.layout: One or two lines of massive text per screen height. Text scrolls through like a cinematic sequence.

cta.label: Full-Screen CTA Break
cta.layout: Full viewport CTA section. Video or color fill. Single headline, single button. Nothing else.

cta.label: Inline Ambient CTA
cta.layout: CTA embedded within content flow, not a separate section. Feels like part of the content.

cta.label: Sticky Bottom CTA Bar
cta.layout: Thin bar appears after first scroll. Contains one CTA. Dismissible.

footer.label: Large Statement Footer
footer.layout: Footer opens with huge headline (brand name or tagline). Links in small text below.

footer.label: Minimal Single-Row Footer
footer.layout: One row: logo left, links center, legal right. Nothing more.

footer.label: Editorial Multi-Column Footer
footer.layout: 3–4 columns. Brand column with description, nav links, contact, social. Rich but clean.
